mapper.insert: INSERT INTO document (id, tenant_id, knowledge_base_id, uploaded_by, title, file_name, file_type, file_size, mime_type, minio_bucket, minio_object_key, content_hash, parse_status, retry_count, chunk_count, version, gmt_create, gmt_modified, is_deleted) VALUES (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{knowledgeBaseId}, #{uploadedBy}, #{title}, #{fileName}, #{fileType}, #{fileSize}, #{mimeType}, #{minioBucket}, #{minioObjectKey}, #{contentHash}, #{parseStatus}, 0, 0, 0, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, knowledge_base_id, uploaded_by, title, file_name, file_type, file_size, mime_type, minio_bucket, minio_object_key, content_hash, parse_status, retry_count, chunk_count, version, gmt_create, gmt_modified, is_deleted FROM document WHERE id = #{id} AND knowledge_base_id = #{knowledgeBaseId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT id, tenant_id, knowledge_base_id, uploaded_by, title, file_name, file_type, file_size, mime_type, minio_bucket, minio_object_key, content_hash, parse_status, retry_count, chunk_count, version, gmt_create, gmt_modified, is_deleted FROM document WHERE knowledge_base_id = #{knowledgeBaseId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY gmt_create DESC

SELECT id, tenant_id, knowledge_base_id, uploaded_by, title, file_name, file_type, file_size, mime_type, minio_bucket, minio_object_key, content_hash, parse_status, parse_error, retry_count, chunk_count, parsed_at, version, gmt_create, gmt_modified, is_deleted FROM document WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE document SET parse_status = #{parseStatus}, parse_error = #{parseError}, gmt_modified = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE document SET parse_status = #{parseStatus}, parse_error = NULL, chunk_count = #{chunkCount}, parsed_at = #{parsedAt}, gmt_modified = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE document SET parse_status = #{parseStatus}, parse_error = #{parseError}, retry_count = #{retryCount}, gmt_modified = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
